The '''New Plympto resistance''' was the [[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurian]] resistance against the forces of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and, following the [[Battle of New Plympto (Clone Wars)|Battle of New Plympto]], the forces of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took control of [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]]. They [[Cleansing of New Plympto|held out]] for a [[Standard month/Legends|month]] with the help of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Dass Jennir]] but were finally wiped out by the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] at the [[Battle of Half-Axe Pass]].

Members of the resistance included [[General/Legends|General]] [[Rootrock]], [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Limbfree]], and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Bomo Greenbark]].
